mapper.sql: id::text AS id, name, description, address, latitude, longitude, phone, email, image_ids::text[] AS "imageIds", open_yn AS "openYn", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM village_profile ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO village_profile (name, description, address, latitude, longitude, phone, email, image_ids) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, ${address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{phone}, #{email}, ${imageIds}) RETURNING
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM village_profile
open_yn = ANY(${openYns}) AND name ILIKE '%' || #{q} || '%'
SELECT FROM village_profile WHERE id = ${id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO village_profile (name, description, image_ids, open_yn) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, ${imageIds}, #{openYn}) RETURNING
mapper.update:
UPDATE village_profile
name = #{name}, description = #{description}, address = ${address}, latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, image_ids = ${imageIds}, open_yn = #{openYn},
WHERE id = ${id} RETURNING
